accureInterest().details: Uses lazy accrual based on elapsed time since the last accrual.

params.params: Struct containing stablecoin, collateral, oracle and risk parameters.

params.receiver: Address whose account receives the collateral.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pause().details: Can only be called by the contract owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

unpause().details: Can only be called by the contract owner.

accureInterest().notice: Public entry point to accrue interest on total protocol debt.

borrowFiat(address,uint256).notice: Borrow stablecoins against the caller’s collateral.

constructor.notice: the borrow stable engine configuration and core state.

depositCollateral(address,uint256).notice: Deposit collateral on behalf of a receiver.

withdrawCollateral(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral from the caller’s account.
